name: PluginAttribute
summary: The PluginAttribute class is used for storing the name of the plug-in to the system. The attribute is initialized from the custom attribute [Plugin("PluginName")] in the plug-in source.

constructors.name: PluginAttribute
constructors.summary: The custom attribute [Plugin("PluginName")] uses this to store the name to the system. This is not to be used by itself.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the plug-in in the system.
